allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'{len\(d\)} teams loaded'\); print\(list\(d.items\(\)\)[:5]\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('OK —', sum\(len\(v\) for v in d.values\(\) if isinstance\(v,list\)\), 'games'\)")

Bash(python3 -c " import json, sys data = json.load\(sys.stdin\) events = data.get\('events', []\) for ev in events[:2]: comp = ev['competitions'][0] for c in comp.get\('competitors', []\): print\('Team:', c['team']['displayName']\) print\('Form:', c.get\('form'\)\) print\('Records:', c.get\('records'\)\) print\(\) ")

Bash(python3 -c " import json, sys, re def normalize\(name\): name = name.lower\(\) name = re.sub\(r'-', ' ', name\) name = re.sub\(r'\\b\(fc|cf|sc|afc|ac|as|ss|rc|rsc|cd|ud|sd|real|atletico|atlético|atletico de|bsc\)\\b', '', name\) name = re.sub\(r'[^a-z0-9 ]', '', name\) name = re.sub\(r'\\s+', ' ', name\).strip\(\) return name data = json.load\(sys.stdin\) events = data.get\('events', []\) print\('ESPN today \(normalized\):'\) for ev in events: comp = ev['competitions'][0] home = next\(\(c for c in comp['competitors'] if c['homeAway']=='home'\), None\) away = next\(\(c for c in comp['competitors'] if c['homeAway']=='away'\), None\) if home and away: hn = normalize\(home['team']['displayName']\) an = normalize\(away['team']['displayName']\) print\(f' {hn} vs {an}'\) print\(f' home record: {home.get\(\\"records\\"\)}'\) ")

Bash(python3 -c " import json, sys, re def normalize\(name\): name = name.lower\(\) name = re.sub\(r'-', ' ', name\) name = re.sub\(r'\\b\(fc|cf|sc|afc|ac|as|ss|rc|rsc|cd|ud|sd|real|atletico|atlético|atletico de|bsc\)\\b', '', name\) name = re.sub\(r'[^a-z0-9 ]', '', name\) name = re.sub\(r'\\s+', ' ', name\).strip\(\) return name data = json.load\(sys.stdin\) print\('Odds API today \(normalized\):'\) for g in data[:5]: h = normalize\(g['home_team']\) a = normalize\(g['away_team']\) print\(f' {h} vs {a}'\) ")

Bash(python3 -c " import json, sys data = json.load\(sys.stdin\) events = data.get\('events', []\) print\(f'Total EPL events today: {len\(events\)}'\) for ev in events: comp = ev['competitions'][0] home = next\(\(c for c in comp['competitors'] if c['homeAway']=='home'\), None\) away = next\(\(c for c in comp['competitors'] if c['homeAway']=='away'\), None\) date = ev.get\('date', ''\) status = ev.get\('status', {}\).get\('type', {}\).get\('name', ''\) if home and away: print\(f' {home[\\"team\\"][\\"displayName\\"]} vs {away[\\"team\\"][\\"displayName\\"]} | {date} | {status}'\) ")
Bash(python3 -c " import json, sys data = json.load\(sys.stdin\) print\(json.dumps\(data, indent=2\)[:3000]\) ")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(list\(d.keys\(\)\)[:10]\)" echo "---" curl -s "https://site.web.api.espn.com/apis/v2/sports/soccer/eng.1/standings?season=2025")

Bash(python3 -c " import json, sys data = json.load\(sys.stdin\) children = data.get\('children', []\) print\('Children:', len\(children\)\) if children: child = children[0] print\('Child keys:', list\(child.keys\(\)\)\) standings_list = child.get\('standings', {}\) print\('Standings keys:', list\(standings_list.keys\(\)\) if isinstance\(standings_list, dict\) else type\(standings_list\)\) entries = standings_list.get\('entries', []\) if isinstance\(standings_list, dict\) else [] print\('Entries:', len\(entries\)\) if entries: e = entries[0] print\('Entry keys:', list\(e.keys\(\)\)\) print\('Team:', e.get\('team', {}\).get\('displayName'\)\) stats = e.get\('stats', []\) for s in stats[:8]: print\(' stat:', s.get\('name'\), '=', s.get\('value'\), s.get\('summary', ''\)\) ")

Bash(python3 -c " import json, sys data = json.load\(sys.stdin\) events = data.get\('events', []\) print\(f'Games found: {len\(events\)}'\) for ev in events[:3]: comp = ev['competitions'][0] home = next\(\(c for c in comp['competitors'] if c['homeAway']=='home'\), None\) away = next\(\(c for c in comp['competitors'] if c['homeAway']=='away'\), None\) if home and away: print\(f' {home[\\"team\\"][\\"displayName\\"]} vs {away[\\"team\\"][\\"displayName\\"]} | {ev[\\"date\\"]}'\) print\(f' form: {home.get\(\\"form\\"\)} | records: {home.get\(\\"records\\"\)}'\) ")

Bash(python3 -c " import json, sys data = json.load\(sys.stdin\) events = data.get\('events', []\) print\(f'Games on Apr 14: {len\(events\)}'\) for ev in events[:3]: comp = ev['competitions'][0] home = next\(\(c for c in comp['competitors'] if c['homeAway']=='home'\), None\) away = next\(\(c for c in comp['competitors'] if c['homeAway']=='away'\), None\) if home and away: print\(f' {home[\\"team\\"][\\"displayName\\"]} vs {away[\\"team\\"][\\"displayName\\"]} | {ev[\\"date\\"]}'\) print\(f' form: {home.get\(\\"form\\"\)} | records: {home.get\(\\"records\\"\)}'\) ")

Bash(python3 -c " import json, sys, re def normalize\(name\): name = name.lower\(\) name = re.sub\(r'-', ' ', name\) name = re.sub\(r'\\b\(fc|cf|sc|afc|ac|as|ss|rc|rsc|cd|ud|sd|real|atletico|atlético|atletico de|bsc\)\\b', '', name\) name = re.sub\(r'[^a-z0-9 ]', '', name\) name = re.sub\(r'\\s+', ' ', name\).strip\(\) return name data = json.load\(sys.stdin\) entries = data['children'][0]['standings']['entries'] for e in entries[:5]: team = e['team']['displayName'] stats = {s['name']: s['value'] for s in e['stats']} w = int\(stats.get\('wins', 0\)\) d = int\(stats.get\('ties', 0\)\) l = int\(stats.get\('losses', 0\)\) record = f'{w}-{d}-{l}' print\(f'{team} \({normalize\(team\)}\): {record}'\) ")
Bash(python3 -c " import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('errors:', d.get\('errors'\)\); print\('results:', d['results']\) ")

Bash(python3 -c " import json, sys data = json.load\(sys.stdin\) fixtures = data.get\('data', []\) print\('Fixtures Apr 10-20:', len\(fixtures\)\) leagues = {} for f in fixtures: lid = f['league_id'] leagues[lid] = leagues.get\(lid, 0\) + 1 print\('Leagues with games:', leagues\) ")

Bash(python3 -c " import json, sys d = json.load\(sys.stdin\) teams = d.get\('sports',[{}]\)[0].get\('leagues',[{}]\)[0].get\('teams',[]\) print\(f'Saudi teams via ESPN: {len\(teams\)}'\) for t in teams[:6]: print\(f' {t[\\"team\\"][\\"displayName\\"]}'\) ")

Bash(python3 -c " import json, sys data = json.load\(sys.stdin\) events = data.get\('events', []\) print\(f'Events without slug: {len\(events\)}'\) if events: for e in events[-5:]: comp = e['competitions'][0] home = next\(\(c for c in comp['competitors'] if c['homeAway']=='home'\), None\) away = next\(\(c for c in comp['competitors'] if c['homeAway']=='away'\), None\) league = e.get\('season', {}\).get\('slug', ''\) or comp.get\('slug', ''\) note = e.get\('competitions', [{}]\)[0].get\('notes', [{}]\) print\(f' {e[\\"date\\"][:10]} | {home[\\"team\\"][\\"displayName\\"]} vs {away[\\"team\\"][\\"displayName\\"]} | {e.get\(\\"name\\",\\"\\"\)}'\) ")

Bash(python3 -c " import json, sys data = json.load\(sys.stdin\) print\('Keys:', list\(data.keys\(\)\)[:6]\) events = data.get\('events', {}\).get\('pre', []\) or data.get\('events', []\) print\('Events:', len\(events\) if isinstance\(events, list\) else type\(events\)\) print\(json.dumps\(data, indent=2\)[:800]\) ")
